top_signals.title: Saindak Raises Security Concerns in Pakistan’s Mineral-Rich Area
top_signals.summary: Metallurgical Corp. of China-operated Saindak Metals Ltd. wants Pakistan’s government to boost security for its copper-gold mine project in its restive Southwest Balochistan, echoing warnings previously raised by Barrick Mining Corp. over surging violence in the region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: European firms plan exo-atmospheric interceptor for 2027 test
top_signals.summary: Bliksem EXO is meant to defeat ballistic threats including Russia’s intermediate-range Oreshnik missile with separating and maneuvering re-entry vehicles.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: First the coast guard, then an ICBM: China tests new, long-term ways to hold off rivals in Asia
top_signals.summary: Experts say Beijing used both methods to try out new, attention-grabbing and long-term ways to deter others from challenging its territorial claims.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Emerging Stocks Slump as Korea Curbs Fan Selloff in Chip Giants
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market stocks resumed their slide, snapping a two-day rally, as SK Hynix Inc. and Samsung Electronics Co. tumbled after South Korean authorities moved to rein in leveraged funds tracking the chipmakers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: Public Expenditure Statistical Analyses 2026
top_signals.summary: HM Treasury statistical data setting out the year's information on government spending.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: $100 million New Jersey deli fraud defendant Patten wants no prison time despite past conviction
top_signals.summary: James Patten is the person to be sentenced for a scheme that sent the market capitalization of a company that owned just a small New Jersey deli soaring.
